title: Principal audit checkpoint post-ticket-136
problem: Tickets 134–136 completed principal audit closure, README/AGENTS maturity relabel, and canonical context alignment. Three consecutive done tickets since the post-ticket-133 principal audit require a cadence checkpoint before further implementation.
